user_query: I'm an art enthusiast who wants to explore the world of NFT artworks. Can you provide me with a list of the most expensive NFT artworks available in galleries like SuperRare, MakersPlace, and Async Art? It would be great if I could see the images and descriptions of these artworks.

TaskList.description: Query the latest data on the most expensive NFT artworks available in SuperRare.
Query the latest data on the most expensive NFT artworks available in MakersPlace.
Query the latest data on the most expensive NFT artworks available in Async Art.
Aggregate the results from SuperRare, MakersPlace, and Async Art and format them into a list with images and descriptions.
